notes:
No files are downloaded when installing normally. Entering compatibility mode with Proton Experimental seems to download the Windows build (as it downloads a .exe executable). When running this, Steam says it's running but no application actually loads.

Switching to Linux Runtime 1.0 (scout) as per the SteamOS & Linux requirements removes all files again.

Discussion thread here: https://steamcommunity.com/app/1526370/discussions/0/3196993949748958958/
Neither GE-Proton nor vanilla Proton work, and the official Linux build doesn't actually download any files.
